mapper.sql: id, rorder_no, rorder_item, rorder_fno, model_no, quantity, price, price_enduser, eprice, tax_rate, ntax_pice, ntax_amount, tax_amount, amount, discount, dlv_date, cdlv_date, wms_dlv_date, spec_offer_no, source_type, cproduct_no, spec_mark, remark, product_name, opponent, ppl_no, project_no, group_customer_no, shikomi_no, sales_info_no, pre_sales_order_no, corder_no, custom_code, order_type, status, delete_status, stock_code, stock_type, inventory_type_code, prod_flag, allot_time, ready_time, exp_time, ship_time, ready_qty, exp_qty, returned_qty, address_no, process_date, borrow_no, po_qty, exp_msg, exp_dlv_type, exp_link_no, invoiceGroupKey, invoice_qty, invoice_time, carrierId, expressNo, handover_time, version, create_time, update_time, update_user, create_user, price_user, customer_no, user_no, end_user, ROrdDate, dlv_entire, DlvSite, TransFee, PrjCode, DlvType, Employee, EmployeeNo, OptTime, Operator, ORorderNo, ContractNo, QuotationNo, PurchaseNO, dept_No, HLCode, delivery_dept_no, trade_companyId
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.rcvorder_view
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.rcvorder_view (id, rorder_no, rorder_item, rorder_fno, model_no, quantity, price, price_enduser, eprice, tax_rate, ntax_pice, ntax_amount, tax_amount, amount, discount, update dbo.rcvorder_view
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_item = #{record.rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rorder_fno = #{record.rorderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_enduser = #{record.priceEnduser,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
eprice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tax_rate = #{record.taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ntax_pice = #{record.ntaxPice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ntax_amount = #{record.ntaxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tax_amount = #{record.taxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
discount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dlv_date = #{record.dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cdlv_date = #{record.cdlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
wms_dlv_date = #{record.wmsDlvDate,jdbcType=DATE},
spec_offer_no = #{record.specOfferNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
source_type = #{record.sourceType,jdbcType=CHAR},
cproduct_no = #{record.cproductNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
spec_mark = #{record.specMark,jdbcType=CHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
product_name = #{record.productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
opponent = #{record.opponent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl_no = #{record.pplNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_no = #{record.projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shikomi_no = #{record.shikomiNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pre_sales_order_no = #{record.preSalesOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
corder_no = #{record.corderNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
custom_code = #{record.customCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
delete_status = #{record.deleteStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
stock_code = #{record.stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stock_type = #{record.stockType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prod_flag = #{record.prodFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
allot_time = #{record.allotTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ready_time = #{record.readyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
exp_time = #{record.expTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ship_time = #{record.shipTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ready_qty = #{record.readyQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
exp_qty = #{record.expQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
returned_qty = #{record.returnedQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
address_no = #{record.addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
process_date = #{record.processDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
borrow_no = #{record.borrowNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_qty = #{record.poQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
exp_msg = #{record.expMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exp_dlv_type = #{record.expDlvType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
exp_link_no = #{record.expLinkNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoiceGroupKey = #{record.invoicegroupkey,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
invoice_qty = #{record.invoiceQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_time = #{record.invoiceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
carrierId = #{record.carrierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expressNo = #{record.expressno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
handover_time = #{record.handoverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price_user = #{record.priceUser,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROrdDate = #{record.rorddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dlv_entire = #{record.dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR},
DlvSite = #{record.dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransFee = #{record.transfee,jdbcType=CHAR},
PrjCode = #{record.prjcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
DlvType = #{record.dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
Employee = #{record.employee,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EmployeeNo = #{record.employeeno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptTime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Operator = #{record.operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORorderNo = #{record.ororderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContractNo = #{record.contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QuotationNo = #{record.quotationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PurchaseNO = #{record.purchaseno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
dept_No = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
HLCode = #{record.hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delivery_dept_no = #{record.deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trade_companyId = #{record.tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.rcvorder_view set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rorder_item = #{record.rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, rorder_fno =
